section.title: Common questions, clear answers
section.subtitle: Still wondering? Reach out and I'll be glad to help.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Just reach out! Call, email, or fill out the contact form. We'll set up a free consultation to discuss your goals, timeline, and budget — no obligation.

items.question: Do you help first-time homebuyers?
items.answer: Absolutely. First-time buyers are my specialty. I'll walk you through every step — from mortgage pre-approval to closing day — with patience and clarity.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: I'm based in Halifax and serve the entire HRM, including Dartmouth, Bedford, Sackville, and surrounding communities across Nova Scotia.

items.question: What are your fees?
items.answer: For most home purchases, my services are free for buyers — the seller pays the commission. For selling, I offer competitive rates. I'll always be transparent about costs upfront.

items.question: How long does it take to buy or sell a home?
items.answer: It varies, but most home purchases in Halifax take 30-60 days from offer to closing. Selling depends on market conditions — I'll provide a realistic timeline based on current data.

items.question: Can you help with relocation to Halifax?
items.answer: Of course! I've helped many families relocate to Halifax. I provide neighborhood guides, virtual tours, and newcomer resources to make your move as smooth as possible.
